zh.lifeSummary: 當John Hammond於1475年3月13日出生在英國素福爾可朗 梅爾福德時，他的父親Sir John Hammond III26歲，母親Johanna Littlefield16歲。他於1498年與Lady Johanna Johne Heimbach結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1528年4月22日在英國素福爾可素德波利享年53歲，埋葬在英國素福爾可素德波利。

nameMeanings.name: Hammond
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from the Middle English, Old French personal name Ha(i)mon, the oblique case form of the ancient Germanic Ha(i)mo, a short form of various compound names beginning with haim ‘home’. It frequently developed excrescent -d, giving Hamond, Haimund, and Hawmond. Alternatively, the name could derive from the Middle English personal name Hamund (Old Norse Hámundr, composed of the elements hár ‘high’ + mund ‘protection’), which may have been used in Normandy and in 12th-century eastern England, but the former explanation is more likely. The surname was sometimes confused with Almond and Ammon .

English: in the Bradford area of Yorkshire, the name is a shortened form of Ormondroyd, formerly Hamondesrode, from a lost place in Birstall (Yorkshire), named with the Middle English (Old French) personal name Hamon (1 above) + Middle English roid, a southern Yorkshire pronunciation of Old English rod ‘clearing’.
Irish: generally an importation from England, but occasionally an adopted name for Mac Ámoinn, see McCammon .

variants.name: Hammonds
meanings: English (Shropshire and Staffordshire): variant of Hammond , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Almond
meanings: from the Middle English personal name Almund, in which Old English Æthelmund ‘noble protector’ and Ealhmund ‘temple protector’ have coalesced.
variant of   Allman   and   Allmand   both meaning ‘German’, assimilated by folk etymology to the vocabulary word denoting the tree.

variants.name: Hammett
meanings: English (southwestern England, especialy Devon): from the Middle English personal name Hamet, a pet form of ancient Germanic Hamo (see Hammond 1).

variants.name: Hamon
meanings: Breton, French, and English (Channel Islands): from the Breton, Old French, Middle English personal name Hamon, the oblique case form of the ancient Germanic Ha(i)mo, a short form of various compound names beginning with haim ‘home’. See also Hammond .

variants.name: Hamlin
meanings: English and Irish: of Norman origin, from the Norman French and Middle English personal name Hamelin, a double diminutive of Hamo (see Hammond ).
French: variant of   Hamelin   and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this.

variants.name: Hampson
meanings: English (mainly Lancashire): patronymic from the Norman personal name Hamo, Hamon (see Hammond ).
Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hAmhsaigh ‘descendant of Amhsach’ a byname meaning ‘mercenary soldier’ or ‘messenger’, from the adjective amhasach ‘aggressive’.

variants.name: Haimes
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Yacov, Yosef.

English: variant, with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s, of Haime, of Norman origin, from the Old French personal name Haim (ancient Germanic Haimo, from haim- ‘home’), often Latinized as Hamo. Compare Hammond .
Americanized form of some similar (like-sounding) Jewish surname.

variants.name: Hammon
meanings: English (Middlesex and Ken): variant of   Hammond  .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When John Hammond was born on 13 March 1475, in Long Melford, Suffolk, England, his father, Sir John Hammond III, was 26 and his mother, Johanna Littlefield, was 16. He married Lady Johanna Johne Heimbach in 1498. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 22 April 1528, in Sudbury, Suffolk, England, at the age of 53, and was buried in Sudbury, Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Hammond est né le 13 mars 1475, à Long Melford, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Hammond III, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Johanna Littlefield, avait 16 ans. Il a épousé Lady Johanna Johne Heimbach en 1498. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 22 avril 1528, à Sudbury, Suffolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 53 ans, et a été enterré à Sudbury, Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Hammond am 13. März 1475 in Long Melford, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Hammond III 26 und seine Mutter Johanna Littlefield 16. Er hat 1498 Lady Johanna Johne Heimbach geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 22. April 1528 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Sudbury, Suffolk, England und wurde in Sudbury, Suffolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Hammond è nato il il 13 marzo 1475 nel Long Melford, Suffolk, England, il suo padre, Sir John Hammond III, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Johanna Littlefield, aveva 16 anni. Lui sposato Lady Johanna Johne Heimbach nel 1498. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 22 aprile 1528, nel Sudbury, Suffolk, England, all'età di 53 anni, e fu sepolto a Sudbury, Suffolk, England.

ko.lifeSummary: John Hammond(이)가 1475년 3월 13일 영국 수폴크 론그 멜퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Hammond III(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Johanna Littlefield(은)는 16세였다. 그는 1498년 Lady Johanna Johne Heimbach(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1528년 4월 22일 영국 수폴크 수드버이에서 53세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 수드버이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Hammond nasceu em 13 de março de 1475, em Long Melford, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Hammond III, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Johanna Littlefield, tinha 16 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Johanna Johne Heimbach em 1498. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 22 de abril de 1528, em Sudbury, Suffolk, Inglaterra, com 53 anos, e foi sepultado em Sudbury, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Hammond родился 13 марта 1475 г. в местности лонг мелфорд, суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John Hammond III было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Johanna Littlefield, 16. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Johanna Johne Heimbach в 1498 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер 22 апреля 1528 г. в местности судбури, суффолк, Англия в возрасте 53 лет и был похоронен в местности судбури, суффолк, Англия.
